Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
title: The excited state at 25 MeV in 8Be

x4freetext: The excited state at 25 MeV in 8Be
6Li (99,7%) on thin backing foil
of Ni or C. The thickness of the Li targets was
checked to be approximately 70. ug/cm2 in all runs.
Silicon depletion layer counters. One counter was
mounted in fixed position at 90 degr. to beam axis,
while the other one could be rotated inside the
chamber to any angle.
Compilation produced by Arzamas RFNC-VNIIEF
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.

x4code.headerHelp: Error in value of quantity, defined under ERR-ANALYS

x4freetext: The errors shown represent mostly the
uncertainty in extracting the coefficients from the
curves. They were estimated by assuming different
reasonable fits to the experimental points and
computing the coefficients for these fits (indicated
at one point at each coefficient) .
